dbEquipBonuses.description: 2 of Set: When you use an encounter power, gain a stack of Speedy Anointing, granting 2.5% Accuracy and 25% Recharge Speed for 5 seconds. Stacks up to 3 times.
2 of Set: Encounter triggers Far-Influenced: Outgoing Damage +4% + random buff for 10s. (30s CD)

dbEquipBonuses.name: Prismatic Defier of Dread (2/2)
dbEquipBonuses.description: 2 of Set: While in The Pirates' Skyhold or Dread Sanctum, your Movement Speed is increased by 12%. Every 5s in combat, you will gain a stack of Prismatic Force. Each stack of Prismatic Force grants: General +0.15% Power, DPS +0.15% Critical Severity, Healer +0.4% Overall Outgoing Healing, Tank +0.4% Awareness.
2 of Set: Daily power 25% chance to immediately restore AP.

dbEquipBonuses.name: Celestial (2/2)
dbEquipBonuses.description: 2 of Set: When you use an encounter or daily power during combat, you gain a stack of Divine Charge for 15 seconds. Once you reach 5 stacks of Divine Charge, they are consumed and you are empowered with Divine Fury for 30 seconds, granting +5% Base Damage Boost and +7.5% Overall Outgoing Healing. You may only have 1 stack of Divine Fury at a time.

Once you reach 5 stacks of Divine Charge, they are consumed and you are empowered with Divine Fury for 30 seconds, granting +5% Base Damage Boost and +7.5% Overall Outgoing Healing. You may only have 1 stack of Divine Fury at a time.

2 of Set: While in Pirates' Skyhold or Dread Sanctum, Movement Speed +12%. Each Prismatic Force stack (max 10): General +0.35% Power, DPS +0.5% Critical Severity, Healer +0.4% OOH, Tank +0.4% Awareness.

dbName: Dirge-Touched Lute of the Thayan Zealot

dbEquipBonuses.description: 2 of Set: While in Thay, Movement Speed +10%. Every 3s in combat, gain Umbral Stride stack: General +0.25% Power, DPS +0.5% Critical Severity, Healer +0.3% Overall Outgoing Healing, Tank +0.4% Awareness. Max 10 stacks.
2 of Set: When struck, Heal for 50% of Max HP over 30s. (30s CD)
2 of Set: Use encounter/daily during combat to gain Scalebreaker's Wrath stacks. Each stack 20s: role-based bonus. 6 stacks empower for 30s.
2 of Set: Stand still 3s — Incoming Damage -5%. Stacks 3 times. Removed on move.
2 of Set: While in Thay, Movement Speed +14%, Forte +3%. Whenever you use an encounter power, 15% chance to gain 10% Critical Severity for 6s.
2 of Set: Elk Tribe weapon set bonus from Icewind Pass.
dbEquipBonuses.setName: Weapons of the Elk Tribe Chiefs

dbEquipBonuses.name: Living Magma (2/2)
dbEquipBonuses.description: 2 of Set: Gain 7.5% Power while at full health (decreases relative to missing health). Role bonus: DPS +2.5% Combat Advantage, Tank +2.5% Defense, Healer +2.5% Outgoing Healing. Does not stack. On a Fire-themed map, role bonus is doubled and Movement Speed is increased by 10%.
2 of Set: Increased stat per party member: Party 1 = +200 Power; Party 2-5 progressively adds Defense/Accuracy/CS/CritSev.
2 of Set: Primal Recipuyo. If hit/healed for more than 10% of Max HP in a single blow, BDB and OOH +10% for 10s.
2 of Set: Start of combat: BDB, OOH, Damage Resistance +1%. Every 5s in combat: +1%. Doubled by Trophy Hunter buff. (Max 10%)
2 of Set: Fey-Touched on encounter power: 10% AP + 3% BDB + 6% OOH for 10s. (30s CD)

dbEquipBonuses.name: Hellfire Engine Remains (2/2)
dbEquipBonuses.description: 2 of Set: At the start of combat, your Stamina Regeneration is increased by 15% and your Movement Speed is increased by 15% for 10 seconds. When you kill an enemy, this buff will refresh. When you leave combat, this buff will expire.

2 of Set: Dodge/block/sprint/shadow slip Movement Speed +30% for 2s. (10s CD)
2 of Set: Encounter triggers Fortified: Defense +5%, 10% of Defense added to Power for 10s. (30s CD)
